briefs.title: BC Financial Institutions Fees Regulation updated to standardise 'financial year' terminology
briefs.summary: BC updated its Financial Institutions Fees Regulation to replace the terms 'calendar year' and 'fiscal year' with 'financial year' throughout the rules. This is a housekeeping change — it aligns the wording in the regulation so the same term is used consistently, with no change to how fees are calculated or when they are due.
